channel.title: Comments on: Beer Topics: Beer and Creativity, Ep. 184
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description:
Mike has it right. The ABV is a critical here.
Paul: Do you have a link to that study? I'd like to see how it was conducted.
item.content:encoded:
Mike has it right. The ABV is a critical here.

Paul: Do you have a link to that study? I’d like to see how it was conducted.

item.title: By: Mike
item.dc:creator: Mike
item.description:
100 percent agree, with one qualifier. The "beer" is within "normal" limits, say around 6% give or take a percentage point.
Two barley wines, or "hop slams" and I can't say that I feel any smarter.
Neat episode....keep up the good work.
Mike
item.content:encoded:
100 percent agree, with one qualifier. The “beer” is within “normal” limits, say around 6% give or take a percentage point.

Two barley wines, or “hop slams” and I can’t say that I feel any smarter.

Neat episode….keep up the good work.

Mike
